summary: The implementation covers most of the Phase 1 requirements with strong backend (Motoko) and frontend (React) integration. Customer management (REQ-16, REQ-17), job history (REQ-18, REQ-19), scheduling (REQ-20, REQ-21), job status tracking (REQ-22, REQ-23), Internet Identity authentication (REQ-24), and earth tone UI design (REQ-25) are all substantially implemented. However, some acceptance criteria details are missing from the diff due to truncation, particularly around complete CRUD operations, deletion confirmation dialogs, and full calendar navigation verification.

missing_requirements.requirement: Delete confirmation dialog for customer records
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows CustomerForm.tsx and CustomerCard.tsx components, but no delete confirmation dialog component or delete functionality is visible in the truncated files. The AC specifically requires 'Delete confirmation dialog'.

missing_requirements.requirement: Full CRUD operations for customers including update and delete functions in backend
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo file is truncated and only shows createCustomer, getCustomer, and getAllCustomers functions. The updateCustomer and deleteCustomer functions required by AC 'CRUD functions implemented' are not visible in the truncated content.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update and delete functions for appointments in backend
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo is truncated and does not show update or delete appointment functions. AC requires 'Functions to create, update, retrieve, and delete appointments'.

hallucinated_features.description: User profile management system with name field
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not specify any user profile features. The implementation adds UserProfile type, getCallerUserProfile, saveCallerUserProfile functions in backend, ProfileSetup component in frontend, and profile UI in Header. This functionality was not requested in any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Dark mode theme support with ThemeProvider
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention dark mode or theme switching. The implementation includes ThemeProvider from 'next-themes' in App.tsx and dark mode CSS variables in index.css, which were not requested.
